business_hours.days: Monday to Saturday (year-round), with Saturday hours limited to 9 AM to 1 PM, and 7 days a week (May to September) for full hours
business_hours.start: 7:00 AM (Monday to Friday, May to September), 8:00 AM (Monday to Friday, October to April), 9:00 AM (Saturday, year-round)
business_hours.end: 8:00 PM (Monday to Friday, May to September), 5:00 PM (Monday to Friday, October to April), 1:00 PM (Saturday, year-round)

non_emergency_routing_rules: message only, next business day callback
integration_constraints: do not create ServiceTitan job for commercial refrigeration clients
do not create ServiceTitan job for pool equipment clients
after_hours_flow_summary: message only, next business day callback for non-emergencies
notes: always confirm caller's address, confirm service zone within 35 miles of Phoenix before proceeding, prioritize residential emergencies in summer, and provide specific examples of cool places for emergency flow
